channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree has 3xcessive growth at low level, 28th May
item.description:
This is a regular issue and repeated by many trees of same type in our road. Extremely fast growing low level branches to ground level...some of which h I have personally hand pruned. This tree needs lopping as soon as possible as causes issues to pedestrians passing on numerous occasions and vehicular parking on the adjacent kerbside
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags blocking off residents’ parking for several days, 28th May
item.description:
Bags of construction rubble blocking off parking spaces for several days now - taking up two to three full spaces at a time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bouverie Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Needs cleaning, 28th May
item.description:
Please clean this place properly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lampard Grove, Hackney, London

item.title: Rubbish, 28th May
item.description:
This is ridiculous. Please remove all rubbish

item.description:
Fly tip 2 Tudor Rd. Mattress and other stuff.

item.title: Loose manhole cover, 28th May
item.description:
When vehicles drive on it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22A, Bevis Marks, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large couch fly tipped corner of St Thomas Place & Well Street, 28th May
item.description:
Re-reporting this as it has been falsely marked as resolved. There is a large dark grey couch fly tipped on the sidewalk on the corner between St Thomas Place and Well Street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lyme Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving ruptured and raised significantly, Inc partial collapse., 28th May
item.description:
An ongoing water leak has caused paving and driveway to rupture significantly. The curb has collapsed and further along paving ruptured about 10cm high at the zebra crossing causing potential for injury. Possibly unstable underneath indicating possible subterranean erosion and potential for collapse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights out on the junction, 28th May
item.description:
Traffic lights out in all directions at the junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again!, 28th May
item.description:
Top of ashburnham road..a sofa a mattress and general rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Asbestos sheeting, 28th May

Wood

item.title: Abandon bikes, 28th May
item.description:
I would like to report several abandoned bicycles on the street at Lawrie Park Road .The bikes have been there a long time and are causing obstruction on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Lawrie Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old furniture dumped on footway outside 167 Half Moon, 28th May
item.description:
I believe this incident only happened today, 28th May.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 78, Half Moon Lane, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hackney Waste collection truck left a bunch of rubbish on the road, 28th May
item.description:
Hackney Waste collection truck left a bunch of rubbish on the road today that has swept down the whole street when they were collecting the big bins today (I think from the hotel) This is down Britannia Walk and is very unsightly and smelly for pedestrians

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Britannia Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 104 Durrington Rd keep dumping rubbish, 28th May
item.description:
Neighbour opposite keep dumping her rubbish on the street which causes the foxes to gather and also its where the parents and children walk by to go to school each day. Its dirtying the street because the breeze blows the rubbish and it end up along the rd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durrington Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous parking commercial vehicles, 28th May
item.description:
Since last month the resident living on Farman Road is parking 2 commercial vehicles (recovery trucks) at the start of Farnham Road. It blocks the visibility for drivers and pedestrians. I have seen few near crashes and dangerous situation which could have caused major crash or fatality. Please asked them to remove these big trucks from parking. This is happening at both ends of Farnham Road so if we can double yellow these ends it will save life’s and crashes. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farnham Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing again, 28th May
item.description:
Please empty the bins. If you can’t supply bigger ones or more of them then unfortunately you’re going to have to keep coming to clear them every holiday and weekends in the summer months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leafield Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Water is coming

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 28th May
